capabilities.name: assistant_direct
capabilities.summary: Fast conversational answer path that does not need tool execution.
limitations: does not execute external actions
should not claim work was completed
avoid_when: the user asked for a real action or artifact
honesty_notes: Use this path when answering is enough and no tool evidence is required.
failure_semantics: ask a concise follow-up if the request is ambiguous

capabilities.name: memory_context
capabilities.summary: Local memory capture and recall for useful user, project, and operational context.
limitations: not a secrets store
semantic retrieval is still future-facing
avoid_when: raw credentials or secrets are present
honesty_notes: Secrets should stay out of ordinary memory.
failure_semantics: skip secret-like content
answer honestly when no matching memory exists

capabilities.name: playwright_browser
capabilities.summary: Cheap local browser backend for direct URL opening, inspection, summaries, visible local execution, and evidence capture.
strengths: visible local browser window when configured
limitations: not ideal for open-ended multi-site workflows
blocked by CAPTCHA, 2FA, login walls, payment steps, sensitive forms, or missing credentials
avoid_when: complex authenticated workflows require stronger browser reasoning
honesty_notes: Use Playwright/local browser first for simple browser tasks.
Do not describe the complex browser agent as live just because this direct browser path is live.
failure_semantics: blocked when browser access is disabled or missing
blocked on CAPTCHA, 2FA, login walls, payment steps, sensitive forms, or access denied pages

capabilities.name: source_backed_search
capabilities.summary: Lightweight current-information research through a configured search provider with source titles, URLs, and timestamps.
limitations: does not inspect or interact with a specific page
cannot complete without source titles and URLs
provider citations still need reviewer/verifier evidence gates
avoid_when: the user asks to open, inspect, click, fill, log into, or test a specific URL or page
honesty_notes: Search finds information; browser execution inspects a specific page; Browser Use remains future-facing for multi-step web actions.
No API keys should be stored in ordinary memory.
execution_semantics: Research Agent synthesis from returned evidence
failure_semantics: blocked if no provider is configured
blocked if the provider returns no usable sources

capabilities.name: personal_lists_notes
capabilities.summary: Structured Personal Ops storage for user-created lists and lightweight notes, separate from ordinary chat memory.
limitations: not a full task database
not a secrets store
avoid_when: casual chat
general knowledge questions
coding tasks
raw credentials
honesty_notes: Personal lists and notes are stored outside ordinary transcript memory.
Use this for user-created list content instead of durable fact extraction.
execution_semantics: session referents for phrases like that list
failure_semantics: blocked when the list or item cannot be resolved unambiguously

capabilities.name: proactive_routines
capabilities.summary: Future Personal Ops routine manifest for recurring agentic workflows without claiming live autonomous execution.
limitations: full proactive routine scheduler is not implemented in this pass
avoid_when: the user expects a live recurring message now; use reminders when applicable
honesty_notes: A planned routine record is not the same thing as live proactive execution.
execution_semantics: manifest-only placeholder unless a live scheduler is explicitly attached later
failure_semantics: blocked honestly for autonomous routine execution

capabilities.name: browser_use_browser
capabilities.summary: Optional local-first provider boundary for safe multi-step browser workflows when enabled and configured.
limitations: must not be called while disabled or unconfigured
not the default for simple direct URL tasks
does not replace SearchProvider or the Playwright page-inspection path
suited_for: complex browser workflows after local backend fails or is insufficient
explicit Browser Use requests when configured
avoid_when: simple direct URL tasks
the adapter is not configured
honesty_notes: Browser Use is optional; explain missing configuration plainly instead of pretending it ran.
When visible local execution is supported by the provider, prefer that for user-watchable work.
execution_semantics: normalized evidence returned through the browser agent
failure_semantics: blocked until enabled/configured
falls back to Playwright only when the task has a safe direct URL and fallback is allowed

capabilities.name: codex_cli
capabilities.summary: Managed coding/build lane for bounded workspace edits, debugging, refactors, and tests.
limitations: only within approved workspace scope
should not steal casual chat or simple file tasks
avoid_when: simple file writes
assistant questions
browser-only tasks
honesty_notes: Use Codex for real coding/build work, not ordinary assistant chat.
execution_semantics: managed local coding process when enabled
failure_semantics: blocked if Codex CLI is disabled or unavailable

capabilities.name: manus_agent
capabilities.summary: Future premium external autonomous agent for high-complexity managed execution.
limitations: not integrated in this pass
should never be used for trivial work
requires explicit configuration
suited_for: future premium delegation after local/standard paths are insufficient
avoid_when: simple tasks
disabled or unconfigured runtime
no explicit need for premium delegation
honesty_notes: Manus remains blocked until an adapter and credentials are configured.
failure_semantics: blocked until configured and enabled

capabilities.name: openai_agents_sdk
capabilities.summary: Future specialist managed-agent adapter surface for tool-connected agents.
limitations: adapter-ready only
not a default route for simple tasks
avoid_when: local tools can satisfy the request cheaply
honesty_notes: Keep this as a future adapter until credentials and execution contracts are attached.
failure_semantics: blocked until configured and enabled

capabilities.name: file_tool
capabilities.summary: Workspace-scoped file create, read, and list operations.
limitations: workspace-scoped only
not a general filesystem agent
avoid_when: the task requires broad filesystem access outside the workspace
honesty_notes: Only workspace-scoped file actions are live right now.
failure_semantics: blocked if the requested path escapes the workspace

capabilities.name: runtime_tool
capabilities.summary: Narrow local command execution inside the configured workspace.
avoid_when: the task needs long-running orchestration or unbounded shell control
honesty_notes: This is intentionally narrow, not a full autonomous shell agent.
failure_semantics: blocked if the command fails or times out

capabilities.name: slack_transport
capabilities.summary: Slack DM interface for the main operator when configured.
avoid_when: Slack credentials are not configured
honesty_notes: Slack is first-class, but only counts as live when credentials are configured in this runtime.
failure_semantics: unavailable if Slack credentials are missing
configured_but_disabled when present but disabled

capabilities.name: slack_outbound_delivery
capabilities.summary: Outbound Slack posting for proactive reminders and assistant follow-ups.
avoid_when: Slack bot token is missing or Slack delivery is disabled
honesty_notes: Outbound Slack delivery is separate from inbound Slack transport and should be described separately.
failure_semantics: blocked without SLACK_BOT_TOKEN
blocked if Slack API rejects the message

capabilities.name: llm_reasoning
capabilities.summary: OpenRouter-backed reasoning for request interpretation, planning, routing, and evaluation.
avoid_when: no provider is configured or the result cannot be validated
honesty_notes: When unavailable, deterministic fallbacks should keep the system usable without pretending the LLM is active.
failure_semantics: falls back when provider access is missing or unreliable
evidence_expectations: structured plan or reasoning payload when used

capabilities.name: browser_execution
capabilities.summary: Direct simple browser opening, inspection, and screenshot evidence capture through the local Playwright-backed tool path.
suited_for: browser QA evidence for known pages
avoid_when: live browser access is unavailable
the site needs unsupported auth, human verification, payment, purchase, or sensitive form handling
the task needs open-ended multi-site browser reasoning
honesty_notes: Direct URL inspection can run for real when the local browser runtime is enabled.
Do not describe the complex browser agent as live just because direct browser execution is live.
failure_semantics: blocked when browser access is disabled
blocked when the page requires login, CAPTCHA, 2FA, payment, purchase, or sensitive form handling
blocked when local browser support is missing

capabilities.name: email_delivery
capabilities.summary: General email capability owned by the unified Communications Agent.
avoid_when: the runtime has no Gmail OAuth token
honesty_notes: Email is not a separate agent path; Gmail is one channel under the Communications Agent.
failure_semantics: blocked without Gmail OAuth setup, auth, and provider confirmation

capabilities.name: gmail
capabilities.risk_level: low for read/search/draft; medium/high for send/delete/forward/bulk changes
capabilities.summary: Gmail read/search/summarize/draft plus guarded send and mailbox actions through the Communications Agent.
avoid_when: calendar/reminder requests
SMS/Discord requests
no Gmail OAuth setup
honesty_notes: Never silently send, delete, archive, forward, or bulk-modify Gmail.
Do not store Gmail credentials or tokens in ordinary memory.
execution_semantics: send/delete/archive/forward and bulk mailbox changes require explicit confirmation
failure_semantics: fast setup-needed response when OAuth credentials, token, enablement, or Google dependencies are missing

capabilities.name: google_calendar
capabilities.risk_level: low for read-only; medium/high for create/update/delete
capabilities.summary: Google Calendar reads and guarded event actions through the Scheduling / Personal Ops Agent.
avoid_when: the runtime has no Google OAuth credentials or token
the request is actually a Sovereign reminder
honesty_notes: Calendar behavior only counts as live after Google OAuth credentials and token are configured.
Calendar and reminders are owned together by the Scheduling / Personal Ops Agent.
execution_semantics: destructive or externally visible writes require confirmation
failure_semantics: blocked without OAuth setup
blocked honestly when dependencies or token are missing

capabilities.name: google_tasks
capabilities.risk_level: low for list/create/complete; high for destructive bulk actions
capabilities.summary: Google Tasks list, create, and complete actions through the Scheduling / Personal Ops Agent.
avoid_when: calendar events with scheduled time blocks
reminders that should notify the user
bulk deletes or destructive cleanup
honesty_notes: Tasks are to-do items, not calendar time blocks or notification reminders.
Do not store Google credentials or tokens in ordinary memory.
execution_semantics: recent task referents support phrases like that task and the second one
failure_semantics: blocked without Google Tasks setup
ambiguous task completion asks one clarification

capabilities.name: reminder_scheduler
capabilities.summary: Scheduler-backed one-time and recurring reminders with durable state and outbound follow-up delivery.
limitations: needs scheduler backend and outbound delivery to be live
avoid_when: the scheduler backend or outbound delivery path is not live
honesty_notes: Reminders only count as live when both the scheduler backend and outbound delivery path are ready.
execution_semantics: Slack outbound delivery for the current MVP
failure_semantics: blocked without scheduler backend
blocked without outbound Slack delivery

capabilities.name: messaging_notifications
capabilities.summary: Future cross-channel messaging beyond Slack transport.
avoid_when: no delivery adapter exists for the requested channel
honesty_notes: Messaging beyond Slack transport is still planned, not live.
failure_semantics: blocked without provider config or confirmation

capabilities.name: sms
capabilities.summary: Future SMS/text channel placeholder under the Communications Agent.
avoid_when: any current execution request; this is not callable yet
honesty_notes: SMS/text is intentionally disabled/future and must not be called yet.
failure_semantics: planned until implemented

capabilities.name: discord
capabilities.summary: Future Discord channel placeholder under the Communications Agent.
avoid_when: any current execution request; this is not callable yet
honesty_notes: Discord is intentionally disabled/future and must not be called yet.
failure_semantics: planned until implemented

capabilities.name: semantic_retrieval
capabilities.summary: Future semantic retrieval path for memory and knowledge lookup.
avoid_when: only keyword retrieval is available
honesty_notes: Keyword retrieval exists today; semantic retrieval is intentionally prepared but not yet implemented.
failure_semantics: falls back to keyword retrieval when semantic backend is not live

capabilities.name: openclaw_bridge
capabilities.summary: Future bridge from Sovereign into optional OpenClaw-style external runtimes.
avoid_when: the runtime bridge is not configured or enabled
honesty_notes: This bridge is optional and should never be implied as core live execution before it exists.
failure_semantics: blocked without bridge endpoint and captured bridge evidence

capabilities.name: voice_call_support
capabilities.summary: Future voice, call, STT, and TTS workflows.
avoid_when: no voice/call provider is configured
honesty_notes: Voice and call support are future-facing and should not be implied as active.
failure_semantics: planned until provider routing and media adapters exist

capabilities.name: frontier_model_routing
capabilities.summary: Future provider/model routing layer for frontier models and task-aware model selection.
avoid_when: only one provider is configured or no routing policy exists
honesty_notes: The architecture can prepare for routing before any live frontier router exists.
failure_semantics: planned until a live router and provider adapters are available
